description: Goodnotes is a cross-platform note-taking and digital paper app with handwriting, PDF annotation, whiteboards, text documents, collaboration, and AI features. It serves individual, education, team, and enterprise users across iOS, iPadOS, macOS, Android, Windows, and the web.
summary: Goodnotes exposes a public remote MCP server at `https://claude-mcp-api.ml.goodnotes.com/mcp` (streamable HTTP, no auth documented); no public HTTP/REST API, GraphQL API, or CLI documentation was found on goodnotes.com.
